description: Telemetry rows for the labeller chart using an explicit time window plus context padding.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH bounds AS (SELECT (:start_time)::timestamp - (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_start_ts, (:end_time)::timestamp + (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS context_end_ts) SELECT CAST(t.name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(t.stage_num AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(t.datetime_fmt AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, t.name AS well_name, t.datetime_fmt AS timestamp, t.stage_num, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, t.prop_conc_blend_denso, t.records_in_bucket FROM datastore:historian_telemetry_v1 t CROSS JOIN bounds b WHERE t.name = :well_name AND t.datetime_fmt BETWEEN b.context_start_ts AND b.context_end_ts ORDER BY t.datetime_fmt) q
